description: Tiny licensed multilingual STT smoke corpus for Qwen3-ASR prompt-control experiments. Speech samples are from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set, which is declared cc-by-sa-4.0 on Hugging Face and selected from Mozilla Common Voice. These are benchmark fixtures, not product assets.

samples.description: Spanish female Common Voice clip from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set.
samples.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 per https://huggingface.co/datasets/MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set; selected from Mozilla Common Voice.
samples.expectedText: El Instituto Acton, un Tintag libertario conservador cristiano estadounidense, lleva su nombre.

samples.description: French female Common Voice clip from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set.
samples.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 per https://huggingface.co/datasets/MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set; selected from Mozilla Common Voice.
samples.expectedText: Alors, bon, le message est toujours trop long, qu'est-ce que je peux dire pour qu'il soit plus court ? Telle est la réflexion du jour.

samples.description: Hindi female Common Voice clip from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set.
samples.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 per https://huggingface.co/datasets/MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set; selected from Mozilla Common Voice.
samples.expectedText: वर्ल्ड डायोपिटीज डे मरीजों की संक्या में विश्व में दूसरी नंबर पर है बारत।

samples.description: Japanese female Common Voice clip from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set.
samples.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 per https://huggingface.co/datasets/MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set; selected from Mozilla Common Voice.
samples.expectedText: この法律に定めるもののほか、本部に関し必要な事項は政令で定める。

samples.description: Mandarin Chinese female Common Voice clip from MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set.
samples.license: CC-BY-SA-4.0 per https://huggingface.co/datasets/MiniMaxAI/TTS-Multilingual-Test-Set; selected from Mozilla Common Voice.
samples.expectedText: 之前看到一个视频说某国际大学的一个研究人工智能的博士发表了一篇题为大语言模型会自发产生智能的论文这是对这所国际百年名校的最大耻辱

samples.description: Generated 5 seconds of 16 kHz mono digital silence for no-speech behavior.
samples.license: Generated by scripts/stt-spike/prepare-corpus.mjs for local benchmark use.
